page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine instance running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores with 1.0 thread per core, ensuring no hyperthreading overhead. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

This instance does not include bundled local NVMe or SSD storage, requiring network-attached storage for persistent data. It does not feature any GPU accelerators, making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphics or deep learning workloads. Additionally, there are no complimentary public IPv4 addresses included with the base configuration.

Lacking advanced CPU instruction sets such as AVX-512, AMX, or specialized cryptographic acceleration, the ecs.s2.xlarge is designed for standard, non-vectorized workloads. Its dedicated CPU allocation offers predictable performance compared to shared-core burstable instances. This resource density makes it a qualitatively cost-efficient option for entry-level general-purpose applications, lightweight web serving, microservices, and small development or testing environments.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.xlarge is an x86_64 general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs across 2 physical cores with a single thread per core, eliminating hyperthreading resource sharing. The instance is configured with 8.0 GB of system memory, yielding a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage for data persistence. Lacking advanced instruction sets like AVX-512 or AMX, this instance is optimized for standard computing tasks. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures stable performance, making it a qualitatively cost-effective choice for lightweight web servers, microservices, and development environments requiring predictable resource availability without the overhead of larger instance classes.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM virtual machine featuring 2 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, designed for predictable, entry-level workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.s2.xlarge is a general-purpose KVM instance with 2 dedicated x86_64 vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, ideal for lightweight workloads.
tagline: A dedicated dual-core virtual machine with balanced memory allocation for predictable, entry-level general purpose computing workloads.
bullet_points: Two dedicated x86_64 vCPUs with single-thread-per-core allocation
8.0 GB of system memory providing 4.0 GB of RAM per core
KVM hypervisor-based virtualization with dedicated CPU resources
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators included
Appropriate for lightweight web serving, microservices, and test environments
